race.comment: FASHION SPREE (7) fifth-up for this and a win looks imminent from the low gate. Surged late from back in the field with a tough third as fav over 1305m at Tuncurry. Can race a little closer here and fitness should take her a long way. DYNAMIC DIVA (11) finds a winnable contest today after finishing fifth to Bangkok Hottie two back in town. Will get through the going and take a ton of beating. PURPLE PRINCE (5) fifteen-start Maiden who made improvement second-up with a plugging fifth over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Genuine top-four contender. TOKE (6) took advantage of the good draw and gripped on late with a close-up fourth over 1400m at Tamworth. Cannot be underestimated.
